items.name: Halloween T-Shirt 🎃
items.description:
More Accessories: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=DreamLabs%20Clothing&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale

Thanks for shopping at Dreamlabs! Join our group for updates on new clothing releases and more!

DreamLabs Halloween Poem:
Spooky Shirt, October Night,
A costume party of darkness and fright.
Jack o lantern classic grin,
Ghouls, vampires, ghosts begin.

Through haunted houses all who roam,
From scary movies and creepy gravestone.
Witches cast magic all through the night,
Werewolves howl at the moonlit sky.

Orange and black, colors so tall,
Leaves like feathers, night's awesome fall.
Spiders spin their webs all day,
Trick-or-treat and thanks you say.

In the graveyard, the dead awake,
Skeleton lives, full moon to stay.
The moonlight casts a ghostly glow,
On the spooky shirt we all know.

Aesthetic adventures of monster fright,
Evil pumpkins and candy shine.
On this Halloween night, so dark and light,
Mega awsome costumes shine so bright.

Dripping in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Luxury McBling Gyaru Necklace Knuckle is the ultimate trendsetter piece. Imagine stepping out of a pink leopard-print limo, paparazzi flashes bouncing off your vintage glam statement necklace. The bold brass knuckle charm exudes attitude, while the shimmering diamond and twinkling star catch the light, radiating pure McBling energy. Channeling the fierce, over-the-top aesthetic of Y2K icons, this piece is made for those who dare to sparkle, shine, and rule the scene with unapologetic glamour.
